title: No Crafting
body:
![No Crafting Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HqKmPbGY/images/755f105315020d55615dbb9250a947bac2c055d9.png)

- No Crafting removes the ability to craft items, forcing you to explore, trade, and survive using only naturally generated resources and loot. Perfect for players who want a challenging experience or want to create unique survival maps.

## Features
- Supports almost every Minecraft version
- Disables all crafting recipes
- Works in singleplayer and multiplayer

## Media
![Crafting Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HqKmPbGY/images/16c6fb7d4819186ce2466c4872210bc74127a045.gif)
